Intelligent Mobility & Vehicle Safety Technology

Building the Future of Vehicle Simulation, Validation and Safety Intelligence

DeflecTech helps organisations accelerate the development, testing and validation of intelligent mobility systems through simulation, synthetic data and digital twin technologies.

The Challenge

Building Safer Mobility Systems Is More Complex Than Ever

The future of transportation is being shaped by intelligent vehicles, advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS), autonomous technologies, and connected mobility solutions. Developing and validating these technologies remains one of the biggest challenges facing the industry.

Real-world testing is expensive, time-consuming, and often limited by safety, environmental, and operational constraints. Collecting high-quality data across different road conditions, weather scenarios, traffic situations, and edge cases can be difficult and costly.

As mobility systems become more intelligent, organisations need faster, safer, and more scalable ways to test, validate, and improve their technologies before deployment. DeflecTech exists to help address this challenge.

DeflecTech exists to help address this challenge.
How DeflecTech Helps

Accelerating Innovation Through Simulation and Validation

DeflecTech is developing advanced simulation and validation technologies that enable organisations to test, analyse, and improve intelligent mobility systems in a safe and controlled environment. Our approach combines simulation, synthetic data generation, digital modelling, and future safety intelligence capabilities.

01

Reduce reliance on costly physical testing

02

Accelerate development and validation cycles

03

Generate high-quality synthetic sensor data

04

Evaluate system performance under diverse conditions

05

Improve safety, efficiency, and decision-making

Our mission is to help organisations innovate with greater confidence while reducing the barriers associated with traditional testing methods.

Building Accessible Solution for Vehicle Mobility and Safety

DeflecTech is an early-stage deep technology company developing simulation, synthetic data, and digital twin solutions for the future of vehicle safety.

Focus AreaIntelligent Mobility & Vehicle Safety
Who We Are

Building Accessible Solution for Vehicle Mobility and Safety

DeflecTech is an innovative technology company focused on advancing the future of intelligent mobility through simulation, validation, digital twin technologies, and vehicle safety innovation.

As transportation systems become increasingly connected, autonomous, and data-driven, the demand for safer, more efficient, and scalable testing and validation solutions continues to grow. DeflecTech was established to help address these challenges by developing innovative technologies that support the design, testing, validation, and future deployment of next-generation mobility systems.

Our approach combines simulation environments, synthetic data generation, intelligent validation frameworks, and future digital twin capabilities to help organisations accelerate innovation while reducing cost, complexity, and risk.

Our Mission

To make vehicle simulation and validation accessible, so any team building intelligent mobility can test safely, quickly and affordably.

Our Vision

A future where safer vehicles reach the road faster because testing them is no longer limited by cost, hardware or geography.

Our Values

What We Believe

01

Accessible by Design

Powerful simulation shouldn't require an enterprise budget.

02

Evidence Over Hype

We build real, working capability and show it.

03

Global by Ambition

Designed to work in emerging markets, not just established ones.

DeflecTech / Solutions

From Working Simulation Today to a Full Self-Serve Platform Tomorrow

DeflecTech follows a phased approach — delivering value now through our simulation platform while building toward a broader self-serve platform.

Our Approach

A Phased Platform

DeflecTech is building a platform that evolves through multiple phases, each designed to deliver increasing value to customers and partners.

AVAILABLE NOW

Phase 1A — Simulation Data Services

Generate datasets and simulation outputs for ADAS and autonomous vehicle testing.

IN DEVELOPMENT

Phase 1B — Simulation as a Service

Self-service cloud simulation platform accessible through your browser.

FUTURE

Phase 2 — Digital Twin & Safety Intelligence

Analytics, risk modelling and safety insights at scale.

Current Focus
1A

Simulation & Synthetic Sensor Data — Available Now

Define a driving scenario and DeflecTech runs it in a realistic virtual environment on cloud GPU hardware, returning a complete set of synthetic sensor data for testing and validating your systems.

  • Scenario simulation across urban, pedestrian, cyclist and junction cases
  • Synthetic sensor data: RGB camera, LiDAR, radar, depth, semantic segmentation, GNSS and IMU
  • Cloud execution — no local hardware or setup
  • A library of ready-to-run scenarios you can build on
  • Object annotations and vehicle telemetry for model training and evaluation
Next Stage
1B

Self-Serve Cloud Simulation — Coming Next

We're building a cloud platform that lets you create, run and manage simulations yourself — sign in, choose or build a scenario, launch it, and get results back, all through your browser.

  • Scenario libraries and a simulation dashboard
  • Automated execution and orchestration
  • Analytics and performance reporting
  • Multi-user collaboration and API access
  • Simulation orchestration tools
  • Automated simulation execution
Future Vision
2

Digital Twins & Safety Intelligence — Our Long-Term Direction

Building on simulation, we aim to develop digital-twin and safety-intelligence tools that turn simulation and operational data into insight for road safety, fleets and infrastructure — with an on-premise 'Digital Twin Box' option for regions where cloud access is limited.

Potential Applications
Autonomous vehicle technology  ·  Predictive risk analysis  ·  Crash prevention  ·  Road safety analysis  ·  Fleet risk assessment  ·  Smart city planning  ·  Infrastructure modelling  ·  Mobility analytics  ·  Transportation planning

DeflecTech / Industries

Industries We Serve

DeflecTech's technologies are designed to support organisations operating at the forefront of transportation, mobility, safety, and intelligent systems development. Our simulation, validation, and future digital twin capabilities help organisations accelerate innovation, reduce testing costs, improve safety outcomes, and make better data-driven decisions.

Automotive Manufacturers

The automotive industry is undergoing significant transformation driven by autonomous systems, connected vehicles, electrification, and advanced safety technologies. DeflecTech aims to support automotive manufacturers by providing simulation and validation capabilities that help accelerate development while reducing the risks and costs associated with traditional testing methods.

Vehicle validation and testingADAS developmentAutonomous driving researchSensor evaluationSafety testingScenario-based simulationSynthetic data generation

ADAS & Autonomous Vehicle Developers

Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) and autonomous driving technologies require extensive testing across thousands of scenarios and environmental conditions. DeflecTech's simulation and validation capabilities help developers test, validate, and improve intelligent driving systems in scalable and controlled environments.

Autonomous vehicle testingSensor validationEdge case simulationBehaviour modellingScenario generationSynthetic training datasetsPerformance evaluation

Research Institutions

Research organisations require flexible, scalable, and cost-effective environments for testing new concepts, algorithms, and transportation technologies. DeflecTech aims to provide simulation environments and datasets that support advanced mobility, safety, and transportation research.

Mobility researchSimulation experimentationSafety studiesAI and machine learning researchTransportation modellingDigital twin researchValidation studies

Government Agencies

Government organisations are increasingly exploring intelligent technologies to improve transportation safety, planning, and infrastructure management. DeflecTech's long-term vision includes supporting public sector organisations through simulation-driven analysis, digital twins, and safety intelligence solutions.

Transportation planningRoad safety analysisInfrastructure simulationSmart city initiativesPublic transport optimisationMobility policy evaluationRisk assessment

Mobility Startups

Startups often face significant challenges related to cost, infrastructure, and access to testing environments. DeflecTech aims to provide scalable simulation and validation capabilities that enable startups to accelerate development while reducing operational complexity and investment requirements.

Prototype validationProduct testingSimulation-based developmentAI model trainingSafety analysisProof-of-concept development

Road Safety Organisations

Road safety organisations require accurate data and effective analytical tools to understand risks and improve transportation outcomes. DeflecTech's future safety intelligence and simulation technologies aim to support organisations in developing safer transportation systems through data-driven insights.

Road safety analysisRisk modellingAccident scenario simulationSafety intervention testingDriver behaviour analysisTransportation safety research
Industries We Support

Driving Innovation Across the Transportation Ecosystem

DeflecTech is committed to supporting organisations across the mobility ecosystem by providing technologies that improve safety, accelerate innovation, and enable the future of intelligent transportation.

DeflecTech / Roadmap

Platform Roadmap

A phased approach to intelligent mobility innovation — from simulation data services today to a full digital twin and safety intelligence platform.

Development Phases

Platform Evolution at a Glance

DeflecTech is building a platform that evolves through multiple phases, each designed to deliver increasing value to customers and partners.

PhaseFocusOutcomeStatus
1ASimulation Data ServicesGenerate datasets and simulation outputsCurrent Focus
1BSimulation as a ServiceSelf-service simulation platformNext Stage
2Digital Twin and Safety IntelligenceAnalytics, risk modelling and safety insightsFuture Vision
Timeline View

A Phased Approach to Intelligent Mobility Innovation

1A
Simulation Data Services
Our current focus is on developing simulation capabilities that enable the generation of realistic environments, scenarios, and synthetic sensor datasets for testing and validation purposes.
1B
Simulation as a Service
The next stage introduces a scalable cloud-based platform that allows users to access simulation capabilities through a self-service environment, with scenario libraries, simulation management tools, and automated reporting.
2
Digital Twin & Safety Intelligence
Building upon simulation capabilities, DeflecTech aims to develop advanced digital twin and safety intelligence solutions that support decision-making, risk assessment, and mobility innovation.

DeflecTech / News & Updates

News and Updates

Milestones, product updates and what we're learning.

MilestoneJune 2026

DeflecTech's simulation engine goes live

We've reached our first major milestone: DeflecTech's cloud simulation engine now runs end to end. Define a driving scenario, run it on cloud GPU hardware, and receive a full set of synthetic sensor data — camera, LiDAR, radar, GNSS and more.

It's the foundation for everything on our roadmap, from self-serve SimaaS to digital-twin safety intelligence. Want early access or a sample dataset? Get in touch.
